ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the observation location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the observation location */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Taxon ID of the observed species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the observed species */,
  "site_visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site visit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the observation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the observation */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation site */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code of the observation site */,
  "location_precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the observation location */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who made the observation */,
  "observation_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the observation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_observations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_observations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_observations_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_observations_site_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_visit_id") REFERENCES site_visits ("site_visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon */,
  "taxon_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxon */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the taxon */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the taxon */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the taxon */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the taxon */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the taxon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_visits" (
  "site_visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the site visit */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site visited */,
  "visit_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the site visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_visits_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code of the site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  "habitat_description" TEXT /* Description of the site's habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation associated with the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_goals" TEXT /* Goals of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organisation */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Name of the organisation */,
  "organisation_acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the organisation */,
  "organisation_website" TEXT /* Website of the organisation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_details" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_logs" (
  "site_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the site visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the site visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES species_observations ("observation_id")
)
column_names: Taxon ID of the observed species
Scientific name of the observed species
ID of the project associated with the observation
ID of the observer who made the observation
Method used to make the observation
Unique identifier for each site visit
ID of the organisation associated with the project
Role of the user in the project
Unique identifier for each site log
Additional notes about the site visit
Unique identifier for each data version
